title: Template Bleed
summary: A mall incident DOCX about food-court sabotage still leaks a hidden draft asset tied to the Jamba Juice vs. Cinnabon feud.
scenario: Kyan Kotschevar-Smead still works at Jamba Juice after leaking classified Boeing materials, and has been documenting repeated sabotage after James Richards-Perhatch from Cinnabon started poaching customers and interfering with orders. Mall management distributed a cleaned-up DOCX packet, but one embedded media object still contains a concealed draft archive from the original complaint. Solvers need to unpack the Office container, inspect the `word/media` assets, and carve the hidden payload to recover the flag.
learningObjectives: Treat Office files as ZIP containers during forensic review
Locate hidden or overlooked media inside application package structures

artifacts.name: food_court_incident_<seed>.docx
artifacts.purpose: Generated Office package containing the mall-management incident packet and a suspicious media object

artifacts.name: mall_briefing.txt
artifacts.purpose: Background note framing the food-court sabotage investigation

hints: A DOCX is a ZIP package, not a single opaque blob.
Check `word/media` before assuming mall management removed every draft artifact.
